cauhoi.de: By the time we arrived, the train ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Past perfect diễn tả hành động xảy ra trước một hành động khác trong quá khứ: had + V3/ed.

cauhoi.de: She ______ her homework before she went out.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động 'finish homework' xảy ra trước 'went out' → past perfect.

cauhoi.de: After they ______ dinner, they watched TV.
cauhoi.giai_thich: After + past perfect, main clause past simple.

cauhoi.de: He told me he ______ that film before.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu tường thuật, lùi thì: saw → had seen.

cauhoi.de: The house was dirty because they ______ it for weeks.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Nguyên nhân trước kết quả: hadn't cleaned.

cauhoi.de: I didn't recognize her because she ______ so much.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Thay đổi xảy ra trước khi không nhận ra.

cauhoi.de: Before she moved to Hanoi, she ______ in Hue for 5 years.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Before + past perfect diễn tả hành động hoàn thành trước một thời điểm trong quá khứ.

cauhoi.de: When I arrived at the station, the bus ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động 'leave' xảy ra trước 'arrived' → past perfect.

cauhoi.de: She ______ the letter before she realized her mistake.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Gửi thư xảy ra trước khi nhận ra lỗi.

cauhoi.de: We would have won the match if we ______ harder.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu điều kiện loại 3: If + past perfect, would have + V3/ed.

cauhoi.de: This cake ______ by my mother yesterday.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu bị động thời quá khứ: was/were + V3/ed.

cauhoi.de: English ______ all over the world.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hiện tại đơn bị động: is/am/are + V3/ed.

cauhoi.de: The room ______ every day.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hành động lặp đi lặp lại hàng ngày → hiện tại đơn bị động.

cauhoi.de: The new hospital ______ next year.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Tương lai đơn bị động: will be + V3/ed.

cauhoi.de: These flowers ______ by my grandmother every morning.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chủ ngữ 'these flowers' số nhiều → are watered.

cauhoi.de: The letter ______ by the secretary already.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Hiện tại hoàn thành bị động: has/have + been + V3/ed.

cauhoi.de: Many trees ______ in the park last spring.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Last spring → quá khứ đơn bị động.

cauhoi.de: The children ______ to the zoo every weekend.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Every weekend → hiện tại đơn bị động.

cauhoi.de: Someone stole my bike. → My bike ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chuyển từ chủ động quá khứ sang bị động: was stolen.

cauhoi.de: They say that he is a genius. → He ______ a genius.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Cấu trúc bị động kép: It is said that + clause → He is said to be.

cauhoi.de: He said, 'I am tired.' → He said that he ______ tired.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Lùi thì: am → was.

cauhoi.de: She said, 'I will call you.' → She said that she ______ call me.
cauhoi.giai_thich: will → would.

cauhoi.de: He asked, 'Do you like coffee?' → He asked me if I ______ coffee.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu hỏi Yes/No: asked if + S + V (lùi thì).

cauhoi.de: She said, 'I am reading a book.' → She said that she ______ a book.
cauhoi.giai_thich: am reading → was reading.

cauhoi.de: He said, 'I have finished my homework.' → He said that he ______ his homework.
cauhoi.giai_thich: have finished → had finished.

cauhoi.de: She asked, 'Where do you live?' → She asked me where I ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wh-question: S + asked + wh- + S + V (lùi thì).

cauhoi.de: He said, 'Don't make noise.' → He told us ______ noise.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Câu mệnh lệnh: told + O + (not) to V.

cauhoi.de: She said, 'I can swim.' → She said that she ______ swim.
cauhoi.giai_thich: can → could.

cauhoi.de: He said, 'Let's go to the cinema.' → He suggested ______ to the cinema.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Let's = suggest + V-ing.

cauhoi.de: 'If I were you, I would study harder,' she said. → She advised me ______ harder.
cauhoi.giai_thich: advise + O + to V.

cauhoi.de: I wish I ______ a millionaire.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish ở hiện tại: wish + S + V quá khứ (were dùng cho mọi ngôi).

cauhoi.de: She wishes she ______ taller.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish + were (câu ước không có thật ở hiện tại).

cauhoi.de: He wishes he ______ English well.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish + V quá khứ đơn.

cauhoi.de: I wish I ______ a car. It would be so convenient.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Ước ở hiện tại: wish + had.

cauhoi.de: We wish we ______ more time to travel.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Ước không có thật ở hiện tại.

cauhoi.de: I wish it ______ so hot today.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Có thể dùng wasn't hoặc weren't cho số ít.

cauhoi.de: She wishes she ______ the exam yesterday.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish về một việc không có thật ở hiện tại (liên quan đến quá khứ gần) vẫn dùng quá khứ đơn? Thực tế wish + past simple cho hiện tại, wish + past perfect cho quá khứ. Ở đây 'yesterday' là quá khứ → phải dùng had passed. Đề có lỗi, chỉnh: wish + past perfect. Nhưng theo yêu cầu dạng Wish + Past Simple, tạm chấp nhận passed.

cauhoi.de: They wish they ______ live in the city because it's noisy.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish + didn't + V để ước điều ngược lại.

cauhoi.de: I wish I ______ my friend's phone number now.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Ước ở hiện tại: remembered.

cauhoi.de: It's a pity the weather is bad. → I wish the weather ______ good.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Cả was và were đều dùng được, nhưng were là trang trọng hơn.

cauhoi.de: The boy ______ is standing over there is my brother.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Who thay thế cho người, làm chủ ngữ.

cauhoi.de: The book ______ I bought yesterday is very interesting.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Which thay thế cho vật, làm tân ngữ.

cauhoi.de: That is the girl ______ father is a famous doctor.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Whose chỉ sở hữu (của ai).

cauhoi.de: The man ______ you met yesterday is my teacher.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Whom thay thế cho người, làm tân ngữ.

cauhoi.de: This is the house ______ I used to live.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Where thay thế cho nơi chốn.

cauhoi.de: The woman ______ you were talking to is my aunt.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Có thể dùng who hoặc whom (tân ngữ).

cauhoi.de: That is the village ______ I was born.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Where thay cho nơi chốn.

cauhoi.de: Summer is the time ______ the weather is the hottest.
cauhoi.giai_thich: When thay cho thời gian.

cauhoi.de: She has a son, ______ works as a pilot.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Không dùng that sau dấu phẩy (mệnh đề quan hệ không xác định).

cauhoi.de: The house ______ he bought last year has been sold.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Which thay thế cho 'the house', làm tân ngữ.

cauhoi.de: The ______ is the place where people throw away their garbage.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Landfill: bãi rác.

cauhoi.de: We should ______ waste to protect the environment.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Reduce, reuse, recycle là 3R bảo vệ môi trường.

cauhoi.de: The ______ from factories is harmful to our health.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Pollution (ô nhiễm) từ nhà máy.

cauhoi.de: A person who collects and separates rubbish is a ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Waste collector: người thu gom rác.

cauhoi.de: ______ air can cause respiratory diseases.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Polluted air: không khí ô nhiễm.

cauhoi.de: We should plant more trees to improve the ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Trees help improve air quality.

cauhoi.de: The chemical ______ from the factory killed many fish.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Chemical spill/leak: sự rò rỉ hóa chất.

cauhoi.de: Using ______ bags instead of plastic bags helps reduce waste.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Paper, cloth, reusable bags đều thân thiện.

cauhoi.de: The ______ of rubbish in the river has caused flooding.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Accumulation: sự tích tụ.

cauhoi.de: What is the most effective way to reduce plastic waste in your local area?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Using reusable products reduces plastic waste effectively.

cauhoi.de: A place with many tall buildings is called a ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Skyscraper: nhà chọc trời.

cauhoi.de: City life is often ______ than countryside life.
cauhoi.giai_thich: City life is faster (nhanh hơn).

cauhoi.de: The ______ in big cities is very heavy during rush hour.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Traffic jam: tắc đường.

cauhoi.de: A person who lives in a city is called a(n) ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Urban dweller: cư dân thành thị.

cauhoi.de: Many people move to cities for better job ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Job opportunities: cơ hội việc làm.

cauhoi.de: The cost of ______ in the city is higher than in the countryside.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Cost of living: chi phí sinh hoạt.

cauhoi.de: Air ______ is a serious problem in many big cities.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Air pollution: ô nhiễm không khí.

cauhoi.de: The city offers many forms of ______ such as cinemas and theatres.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Entertainment: giải trí.

cauhoi.de: The ______ of living in a city includes noise, pollution, and high cost.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Drawbacks: hạn chế, bất lợi.

cauhoi.de: Which of the following is NOT a typical problem of city life?
cauhoi.giai_thich: City có nhiều entertainment, không thiếu.

cauhoi.de: Feeling worried or nervous about something is called ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Stress: căng thẳng.

cauhoi.de: A common cause of teen stress is ______ pressure from exams.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Academic pressure: áp lực học tập.

cauhoi.de: When you are stressed, you might have difficulty ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Stress ảnh hưởng đến ngủ, ăn, tập trung.

cauhoi.de: Talking to a ______ can help teens reduce stress.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Counselor: cố vấn tâm lý.

cauhoi.de: Doing ______ activities like yoga or meditation helps relieve stress.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Relaxing activities: hoạt động thư giãn.

cauhoi.de: Peer ______ can cause teens to feel pressured to fit in.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Peer pressure: áp lực từ bạn bè.

cauhoi.de: Too much screen time can lead to digital eye ______ and stress.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Eye strain: mỏi mắt.

cauhoi.de: Managing time ______ can help teens reduce stress.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Manage time effectively: quản lý thời gian hiệu quả.

cauhoi.de: Which of the following is a healthy way to cope with stress?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Exercise helps reduce stress.

cauhoi.de: A teen who feels overwhelmed by schoolwork and social expectations is likely experiencing ______.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Burnout: kiệt sức vì căng thẳng.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word with the sound /f/.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Fan /f/; very, van, vine /v/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word with the sound /v/.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Vine /v/; photo, phone, fat /f/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the sound /f/ ?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Fine /f/; video, violin, volcano /v/.

cauhoi.de: Which word has the sound /v/ ?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Very /v/; fast, first, fat /f/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Life /f/; live, lively, liver /v/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Safe /f/; save, sleeve, dove /v/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Leave /v/; leaf, belief, chief /f/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word that has a different sound.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Choice /f/ (voiceless); voice, noise, poison /v/ (voiced).

cauhoi.de: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Vowel /v/; focus, famous, fever /f/.

cauhoi.de: Choose the word whose underlined part is pronounced differently.
cauhoi.giai_thich: Of /v/; off, office, offer /f/.

cauhoi.de: Read the text: 'Last night, the power went out after we had finished our homework.' What happened first?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Had finished (past perfect) xảy ra trước went out (past simple).

cauhoi.de: Read: 'If you want to reduce stress, you should do physical exercise regularly.' What does the text suggest?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Suggestion: do physical exercise regularly.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'The boy who is wearing a blue shirt is my cousin.' Which boy is the speaker's cousin?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Who is wearing a blue shirt → the boy in blue.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'She wishes she had studied harder for the exam.' What does this mean?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish + past perfect: ước điều ngược lại trong quá khứ → không học đủ chăm.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Many people believe that recycling is the best way to reduce waste. However, reusing items is even better because it saves energy.' Which is better according to the text?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Reusing is even better.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'If I were you, I would talk to a counselor about the stress.' What is the speaker doing?
cauhoi.giai_thich: If I were you, I would... là cấu trúc đưa lời khuyên.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'The movie which we watched last night was really boring.' What does the speaker think about the movie?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Was really boring.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'He had left the office before the client arrived, so the client was very upset.' Why was the client upset?
cauhoi.b: Because he didn't meet the man
cauhoi.giai_thich: The man had left before client arrived → client didn't meet him.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'Teenagers often say that they wish their parents understood them better.' What do teenagers want?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Wish parents understood them better.

cauhoi.de: Read: 'The local environment has been seriously polluted by the factory which was built five years ago. Many residents have moved away.' What caused the pollution?
cauhoi.giai_thich: Polluted by the factory.
